text: Which HTTP port for blender-mcp? Current MCP ports: 9930 (firefox), 9931 (chromium), 9932 (web-search). Next down is 9929.

How should blender-mcp MCP server be exposed over HTTP? Other stdio servers (chromium, web-search) use supergateway (stdio→SSE) + tcp_forward. blender-mcp uses FastMCP which supports native Streamable HTTP.
Where to install the blender-mcp addon? Blender 5.1.0 addon dir is /opt/blender-5.1.0/5.1/scripts/addons/. Installing at build time pins it to that Blender version.
options: Runtime in _cont_start.sh (flexible if Blender version changes)

text: How to auto-start the Blender addon socket server? The addon has 'Auto Start Server' preference (blendermcp_auto_start_server) and port setting (blendermcp_port).
options: Set via Blender Python API on startup (--python-expr)
Write prefs to Blender config file at build/runtime

text: Verification test: create /workspace/tmp/test.blend with a Sphere (not Cube). Should this be done via blender-mcp tools (execute_blender_code) or direct Blender Python?
options: Via blender-mcp MCP tools (tests full stack)
Direct Blender Python (simpler, tests Blender only)
